pageTitle: An AI-Native Full-Stack framework engineered for sustainable delivery
pageDesc: Built for evolving business needs with a ready-to-use admin entry point and flexible pluggable extensions
externalLoginHandoffInvalid: Third-party login handoff is invalid or expired. Please try again.
externalLoginConfigMissing: Third-party login is not configured yet. Enter a valid Client ID and Client Secret in the plugin settings first.
externalLoginDiscoveryFailed: Could not reach the identity provider. Check that the Issuer URL in plugin settings is correct and reachable from the application server.
externalLoginFailed: Third-party login failed. Please try again later or contact an administrator.
loginSubtitle: Enter your account details to access the LinaPro host workspace
signUpSubtitle: Start collaborative delivery in your LinaPro workspace
agreeTip: Please agree to the Privacy Policy and Terms
privacyPolicyDefaultBody:
Privacy Policy

This service collects account information required for authentication and workspace access, including username and email. Data is used only to provide the host workspace and related security features. Contact your administrator for data retention and export requests.
termsOfServiceDefaultBody:
Terms of Service

By creating an account you agree to use this workspace in accordance with your organization's policies. Accounts may be suspended for abuse or security risk. The operator may update these terms; continued use after notice constitutes acceptance.
passwordStrength: Use 8 or more characters with a mix of letters, numbers & symbols
forgetPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you instructions to reset your password
forgetPasswordSentDesc: If this email is linked to an account, you will receive a reset link. Complete the password change within 30 minutes.
registerSuccessDesc: Your account has been created. Sign in with your username and password.
resetPasswordSuccessDesc: Please sign in with your new password.
resetPasswordTokenMissingDesc: A valid reset token is missing. Please request password recovery again.
emailValidErrorTip: The email format you entered is incorrect
qrcodeSubtitle: Scan the QR code with your phone to login
qrcodePrompt: Click 'Confirm' after scanning to complete login
codeSubtitle: Enter your phone number to access the LinaPro host workspace
mobileErrortip: The phone number format is incorrect
loginAgainSubTitle: Your login session has expired. Please log in again to continue.
